# Hartha Formation

**Summary**: A Late Cretaceous carbonate formation in the region.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] analyzed the hartha-formation as a distinct unit above the Gudair.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] restricted platform to platform margin

## Diagenetic History

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] dolomitization, recrystallization

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Hartha Formation is characterized by organic, detrital, and glauconitic limestone. ([[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989, p. 62]])
